apps.name: Nuvio Enhanced
apps.versionDescription:
# 🚀 Release v0.3.1  —  Native P2P streaming comes to iOS

## Upstream changelog:
- fix(navigation): defer route cleanup until pop completes @tapframe
- feat: integrate Nuvio Engine @tapframe
- fix: recycled bitmap crash in Now Playing metadata @KhooLy
- fix(settings): normalize section headings @tapframe
- feat: add separate upcoming continue watching row @tapframe
- fix: apply poster depth to remaining surfaces @tapframe
- feat(library): add sortable shelf and grid layouts @tapframe
- support for split ABI @tapframe

## Enhanced changelog:
- All changes from the upstream
- feat(playback): add adjustable subtitle background transparency @luqmanfadlli 
- fix(ios): subtitle background opacity @luqmanfadlli
- feat: add episode rating toggle in TMDB Enrichment @luqmanfadlli 
---

## Variants

### Nuvio Full
This variant is built from the official source without any modifications or additions.

AltStore/SideStore source:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioFull.json
```

### Nuvio Enhanced
This custom variant includes experimental features, quality-of-life improvements, and specific bug fixes not yet available in the upstream repository. This is not the same Nuvio Enhanced by yesnt10.

AltStore/SideStore source:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luqmanfadlli/NuvioMobile-iOS/main/NuvioEnhanced.json
```

**Added Features:**
- iOS: Added adaptive hide/unhide Liquid Glass NavBar on scroll. 
- iOS: Added experimental PiP for iOS and iPadOS.
- All: Added a volume boost feature (up to 200%) for quieter streams (volume up gesture can go beyond 100%).
- All: Added support for Live TV integrations.
- All: Added stream quality selection in Player Control.
- All: Added artwork type selection for Hero background.
- All: Added Trakt alternative auth method to support LiveContainer user.
- All: Relocated Trakt configuratzion into the Integrations Settings menu.
- All: Added Tap-to-Seek (you can tap on player progress bar to seek forward/backward).
- All: Added in-app debug logs (go to Settings -> Advanced -> Debug Logs).
- All: Changed the "Play" button to "Watch Again" for already-watched movies to improve tracking clarity.
- All: Added Library Calendar.
- All: Added playback info button.
- All: Added adjustable subtitle background transparency.
- All: Added episode rating toggle in TMDB Enrichment.

**Bug Fixes:**
- iOS: Fixed animated GIF support for Profile Avatars.
- iOS: Fixed animated GIF support for Stream Badge.
- Android: Fixed status bar visibility

---
### PiP is back for iOS and iPadOS
It's still experimental and can be changed or removed in the future.
Enable it in the Settings -> Playback.
HDR is tone mapped when this option is enabled.

---

> **💡 Note for iOS Users:**
Since Nuvio embeds heavy media frameworks, sideloading tools like AltStore, SideStore, or Sideloadly have to manually re-sign thousands of internal components with your Apple ID certificate. If the installation progress bar looks stuck, please don't close it! Just give it a few minutes to process the signing in the background, and it will install successfully. Use cable connection to speed-up sideloading process.
apps.localizedDescription: Nuvio Enhanced includes exclusive experimental features, volume boosting, and performance fixes not available in the upstream build.

apps.localizedDescription: Identical parity to the official TestFlight version with unlocked plugins and trailers.
